programmes.show_name: New: The Best Ever Disco Music
programmes.show_description: Pull on your platforms! Relive the biggest 1970s disco anthems in the era of Saturday Night Fever, with iconic acts such as The Bee Gees, Amii Stewart, Sister Sledge, Chic and The Trammps.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Will Emily forgive Ross before their honeymoon? Monica and Chandler agree to end their new relationship.
Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Jessica Wall are in Kent treasure hunting with motorcycle instructor Kelly and her daughter Scarlett.
Jules Hudson and expert appraiser David Fergus are in Warwickshire treasure hunting with Andrew and Mandy. Andrew is a retired businessman with a passion for collecting curios.
...Martin's Antiques Showdown. It's the final auction in Oxfordshire, as Paul takes on local antiques legend Tom Keane. Who will take the crown as the winner? (VS) (Ep30)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
...Friends: Big World! Big Adventures! Thomas wants to be like a Flying Doctor's plane who transports Dr Claire to  places where it's difficult for patients to get to hospital.

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Mishap follows mishap as everyone pays a visit to snooty King and Queen Marigold's castle. (VS)
When the Mixmups mix up a baby adventure, how will they cope looking after real wingle babies?
Help the PAW Patrol solve games, puzzles, and brainteasers in these mini-missions. (Ep8)
Peppa's playgroup are making masks. There are carrot masks, robot masks, and even pretty butterfly masks... The only thing missing is lots and lots of glitter!
There is a new girl at school, and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit. Molly shows them how good she is at digging.
After Strawberry shows off her well-trained new pet, Gaston is sent to pet school where Miss Jolly soon gets him into shape.
Nia is planning a party to celebrate the anniversary of her arrival on Sodor. But when she tries to talk about it, she finds that her friends are too busy.
During the annual firework show, The Sparkes find out that the safest way to enjoy the show is through the official public display.
Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure.
Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.
Grandpa is building something in his shed. It is his latest pet project. It's a robot called Frank.
Posy persuades Pip to swap toys for keeps in Swapsies, but soon regrets her decision. It turns out Pip's toy shark doesn't mean as much to her as her old fire engine.
The Woohoos try to find some 'woody pebbles' for their Autumn Scavenger Hunt. A little piggy helps them discover that conkers are tree seeds that grow inside spiky shells.
When Paddington and Mateo form a table tennis team, they beat the table hogs, so that everyone can play.
...a Meltdown. It's such a baking hot day in Adventure Bay that things are melting!
...Mystery of the Missing Phones. Mobile phones are vanishing all over Adventure Bay!
The cadets team up with farmer Wil and farmer Claire to give some ducks a health check, feed the hungry lambs, and make sure a rescue hen called Belle is happy and healthy!
Sam, Kit and Wally Bungler investigate an unidentified shiny object (USO) that's interrupting the Firefly Prom and throwing the teen fireflies into disarray!
Patrick presents a show about food after missing out on a hearty breakfast.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
The series following those who've traded the UK for a sunnier and more lucrative life on the Spanish Costas, including Colin the Benidorm drag queen.
Managers at the Rio Park in Benidorm have clocked off for Bank Holiday, so it's a great opportunity for junior staff to prove themselves. Abi is in charge on reception.
Hotel staff in Benidorm are gearing up for a weekend of fun and screams as Halloween is in town. At the Flamingo, Michael is on reception with a busy day of checking in guests.
Jane's third stop is the Florida Keys. She's visited the Keys many times, but this is the first time in 20 years that Jane's revisiting her old haunts on Key West.
Jane's final stop on her US road trip is Miami, and her last stop takes her into reverse as she travels back up from the Keys.
Family adventure. A group of children are evacuated to a Yorkshire village during the Second World War, where they encounter a young soldier who, like them, is far away from home. (2022)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Family adventure. A group of children are evacuated to a Yorkshire village during the Second World War, where they encounter a young soldier who, like them, is far away from home. (2022)
Blackly comic children's drama starring Danny DeVito and Rhea Perlman, based on Roald Dahl's novel about a young girl with magical powers and parents obsessed with game shows. (1996)
National and international news.
Missing Out? We lift the lid on the multi-billion-pound business of supermarket clothing in the UK, asking whether supermarket clothes offer a bargain or a lesson in buy cheap, buy twice?
British shoppers love how Marks and Spencer's food stores have undergone an extraordinary transformation. This documentary reveals the story behind their stunning new Food Hall-style stores.
Hard-up pensioners Hilary and Malcolm join millionaire restauranteurs Michael and Andres on two very different holidays on Tenerife, leading to a beautiful life-changing moment.
Millionaire currency trader Lewis and his wealthy best friend Helen swap their life of luxury with cleaner Nicole and joiner Grant, who are bringing up three boys on a shoestring.

programmes.show_name: When Train Journeys Go Horribly Wrong
programmes.show_description: This show features first-hand accounts from people whose train journeys went off the rails - from extraordinary obstructions to terror on the tracks.
Police race to catch a violent suspect hiding in gardens. A drug driver, a collapsed man, and a man throwing eggs in a Tesco car park keep officers busy during a dramatic night.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Paul Hayes treasure hunt with Ged and Eileen. The couple share a passion for treasure-hunting themselves, trawling charity shops and car boot sales.
Jules and expert appraiser Jessica are in Surrey treasure hunting with Rob and Amanda, who on turning 70 decided it's time to clear out some of the lifetime's worth of possessions.
Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Cheshire treasure hunting with Jojo and Belle. Jojo is an education healthcare coordinator and Belle works for a bank.
...Martin's Antiques Showdown. In Berkshire, Paul goes head to head with local expert Jessica Forrester. Will either auctioneer be wowed by police badges or a pewter model car? (VS) (Ep31)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
...Friends: Big World! Big Adventures! Thomas is in Australia for Christmas and is disappointed it's different to Sodor. He helps a girl retrieve her toy kangaroo from a real one.

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: King Thistle is perplexed when his magic bird-spotting book cannot identify a new creature who makes a nest in the castle. (VS)
Daddy teaches Peppa and George a fun game to play while they wait inside for the rain to stop.
Everyone is excited when Mummy Rabbit arrives with a big tummy and they learn that there is a baby bunny inside.
Fluff walks his muddy paws all over Tweedy's pillow. Can he find a new one that's just as comfortable? (Ep34)
Scratch has planned a fun game of Lucky Dip to play with Badger and Squiggle... Badger discovers an unexpected item. (Ep21)
...Big Adventures! Yong Bao tells Thomas the story of how he came to have a magnificent tiger emblem on his tender and how he had an opportunity to put his bravery to the test.
Competition between Norman and Derek to make the best stone age shelter goes too far and causes a fire on Pontypandy Island.
Pedro Pony pretends he is a proper cowboy, telling everyone stories in the camp he has set up in the garden.
Paddington and the kids overhear Mr Brown talking about selling the house! Will they really have to leave Windsor Gardens?
Pip leaves Posy alone to have a jungle adventure but gets jealous when she invents a new imaginary jungle buddy, Pop.
When the Dizzy Dust Express appears with no one aboard, the Paw Patrol must stop the runaway train and find the missing passengers.
When the travelling veterinarian Dr Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do.
Grampy Rabbit teaches Danny Dog and Peppa why his lifeboat is so important when it comes to saving lives at sea, and gives them tips on how to stay safe.
At the gym, Madame Gazelle is teaching the children about martial arts. Along with Mr Bull, the children learn how to fall safely, balance and how to throw punches in the right stance!
Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy but is confused by his hero's training methods.
Cove beach is covered in a swarm of starfish! But everything is not as it seems! Why have they only got four arms, and why are they plastic?
Digi and Tal volunteer at the Pet Parlour.
Milo, Lofty and Lark get the job of presenting Chef Pierre's daytime TV show, but when they try to stick to the script, the show descends into chaos.
Preschool animation. Lucy's dad is digging up the meadow and the Little Kingdom is in danger. How can they stop him without being discovered?
Bicycles: Daddy Pig teaches Peppa to ride her bicycle without stabilisers - just like her friends.
Odo says he can go to the moon but then lands in hot water after everything he and Doodle try comes up short, until Odo's dad shows up to help.
Join Derek in the Milkshake Studio, where he teaches us the dance moves to some of his favourite songs, with the help of Shake, the Milkshake music speaker! (Ep1)
Join Jen for a hilarious and simple interactive story which plays on a much-loved memory game.
Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.
Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.
National and international news.
Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.
Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!
The board of Hardacre Herring threatens Sam with a grim ultimatum. Mary gets the cold shoulder from the ladies after the soiree and Ma suspects something is wrong with Liza.
Entertainer Rocking Stephanie is a huge fan of music legend Shakin' Stevens, and has a new look to debut at her gig. Plus there's love in the air at a speed dating event.
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
Society Place, a once neglected and rubbish-strewn walkway in Normanton, Derby, is now bursting with life thanks to local schoolchildren and the Derbyshire Wildlife Trust.
Susan visits the exquisite Dumfries House in Ayrshire, exploring its treasures and gardens while recalling her favourite home and garden adventures from her joyful Grand Days Out.
Units tail a van speeding at four times the limit. After the vehicle pops a tyre, the driver tries to flee as a three-wheeler, then on foot. But police dog Quantum is at his heels...

programmes.show_name: New: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programmes.show_description: The series roars back, riding with Staffordshire Police as they tear down the M6 hunting drug-fuelled drivers, brazen boy racers and organised criminals.
Gripping new thriller starring Joanna Scanlan as Sarah, a mother whose world collapses when her daughter disappears during a French school exchange after a late-night missed call. (Ep 1/5)
A student officer has the chance to make his first drugs stop and arrest. At a drive-through, an uninsured driver is pulled over. And a drunk and disorderly fight must be broken up.
A look at how high-speed pursuits of 'drivers failing to stop' cause around 40 deaths a year on Britain's roads. Jamie Theakston presents.
